name: illustrations
description: SVG illustration asset library providing themed empty-state and error-state illustrations (404, 403, 500, no-results, resource types) that respond to Gravity UI CSS theme tokens.
when_to_use: SVG illustration asset library providing themed empty-state and error-state illustrations (404, 403, 500, no-results, resource types) that respond to Gravity UI CSS theme tokens
avoid: Not for functional UI icons — use @gravity-ui/icons. Not for marketing or landing-page imagery.
not_for: Not for functional UI icons — use @gravity-ui/icons. Not for marketing or landing-page imagery.

name: AccessDenied
description: SVG illustration component for access denied / permission error states. Supports all four Gravity UI themes (light, dark, light-hc, dark-hc) via CSS custom properties.
when_to_use: Displaying an empty state when a user lacks permission to view a resource
avoid: Generic error states — use InternalError for 500-type errors instead

name: Bucket
description: SVG illustration component representing a storage bucket resource.
when_to_use: Representing an empty bucket state or storage-related entity pages

name: Chart
description: SVG illustration component representing a chart or data visualization resource.
when_to_use: Empty states for chart or analytics pages

name: Database
description: SVG illustration component representing a database resource.
when_to_use: Empty states for database or data store pages

name: Detail
description: SVG illustration component for detail or information views.
when_to_use: Empty states for detail or info panels

name: Disk
description: SVG illustration component representing a disk or block storage resource.
when_to_use: Empty states for disk, volume, or block storage pages

name: Feature
description: SVG illustration component representing a product feature or capability.
when_to_use: Empty states or onboarding pages that highlight a feature

name: Folder
description: SVG illustration component representing a folder or directory resource.
when_to_use: Empty states for file system, directory, or project folder pages

name: History
description: SVG illustration component representing history, audit logs, or time-based records.
when_to_use: Empty states for history, audit trail, or activity log pages

name: Identity
description: SVG illustration component representing an identity, user, or account resource.
when_to_use: Empty states for IAM, user management, or account pages

name: InternalError
description: SVG illustration component for internal server error (500) states.
when_to_use: Displaying an empty state when a server-side error occurred
avoid: Not found pages — use NotFound instead

name: Network
description: SVG illustration component representing a network or connectivity resource.
when_to_use: Empty states for network, VPC, or connectivity-related pages

name: NoSearchResults
description: SVG illustration component for empty search result states.
when_to_use: Displaying when a search query returns zero results
avoid: Page not found (404) — use NotFound instead

name: NotFound
description: SVG illustration component for 404 / resource not found error states. Uses Gravity UI CSS tokens for theming.
when_to_use: Displaying when a requested resource or page does not exist
avoid: Access denied scenarios — use AccessDenied instead

name: Project
description: SVG illustration component representing a project or workspace resource.
when_to_use: Empty states for project listing or workspace pages

name: Queue
description: SVG illustration component representing a message queue or task queue resource.
when_to_use: Empty states for queue, job, or message broker pages

name: Snapshot
description: SVG illustration component representing a disk snapshot or backup resource.
when_to_use: Empty states for snapshot or backup management pages

name: SuccessOperation
description: SVG illustration component for successful operation or completion states.
when_to_use: Celebrating completion of an operation or onboarding step

name: Template
description: SVG illustration component representing a template resource.
when_to_use: Empty states for template galleries or blueprint pages

name: UnableToDisplay
description: SVG illustration component for states where content exists but cannot be rendered (e.g. unsupported format, render error).
when_to_use: Showing when data exists but cannot be displayed due to format or rendering constraints

name: VirtualMachine
description: SVG illustration component representing a virtual machine or compute instance resource.
when_to_use: Empty states for virtual machine or compute instance pages
